ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Elogio di Celestino Galiano scritto Da Appiano Buonafede
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Elogi di Italiani Illustri Scritti Da Varj
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On pp. 61-62 the author mentions the Academy founded by Celestino Galiani.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
